name: burnrate
description: Local cost & quota dashboard for Claude Code and Codex CLI - zero config, privacy-first

burnRate.customPricing.markdownDescription: Inline pricing overrides for models not covered by the built-in Claude / GPT pricing. Each entry: `"<model>": { "input": ..., "output": ..., "cache_write_5m": ..., "cache_write_1h": ..., "cache_read": ..., "reasoning_output": ... }` in USD per 1M tokens. `cache_write` is still accepted as a legacy alias for `cache_write_5m`. `reasoning_output` defaults to `output`.

burnRate.spikeThresholdUsd.description: Mark assistant turns above this USD cost as spikes.

claudeCostTracker.customPricing.markdownDeprecationMessage: **Deprecated.** Use `burnRate.customPricing` instead. The legacy key is still read for one minor version.

claudeCostTracker.spikeThresholdUsd.markdownDeprecationMessage: **Deprecated.** Use `burnRate.spikeThresholdUsd` instead. The legacy key is still read for one minor version.
